violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Staff did not wash hands between working at dish station and then handling food.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Food containers stacked in other uncovered food containers throughout refrigerators. -Bulk bag of ground hot mustard left open/exposed in dry storage area.--Food package was damaged; integrity of contents was compromised. -Bag of beef bones split open, spilled in chest freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil is not approved for use by food service code. -White grocery bag used to cover/store cream cheese filling. -Box re-used to store egg rolls in refrigerator.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Handle of side by side refrigerator is damaged, no longer a smooth, cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Black debris at upper back interior surface of ice machine. -Debris build up at nozzles of soda dispenser.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Knives, can opener, utensils at prep table all have food residue/buildup. -Glass lid used to cover sauce has heavy residue build up.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Grease/debris at edges of cookline equipment. -Residue/debris at exteriors of food containers throughout refrigeration. -Debris/residue at interiors of refrgierators. -Heavy debris at cooking surface of electric stove.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Vent hood surround and fire supression lines have dripping grease/residue at edges. (Vents are shiny and stated as washed weekly).

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Grease build up at interior surfaces of dishwasher. -Debris build up at top surface of dishwasher.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of single use cups stored on floor in dry storage room. -Sleeves of napkins stored on floor in unused cafe side.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. -Carpet at floor in front of 3 comp sink and along dish washer--Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Cardboard being used on top of carpet at floor near 3 comp sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor throughout due for deep clean, especially under equipment.
